meta.title: Librea - Read More, Pay Less
meta.description: The second-hand book marketplace for readers who want to buy cheaper and sell easily.

howItWorks.step1_description: Search by title, author, or genre and find books available just around the corner.
howItWorks.step2_heading: Agree on a spot, no shipping
howItWorks.step2_description: Connect with the seller and pick a convenient meeting point. No packaging, no waiting.
howItWorks.step3_description: Get the books you love at a fraction of the price. Everyone wins.

claim.heading: The easiest way to buy and sell second-hand books in your neighborhood.
claim.description: No shipping, no hassle. List a book in seconds, find one down the street. Librea makes local book trading as simple as it should be.

footer.tagline: The second-hand book marketplace for readers who want to buy cheaper and sell easily.
footer.emailSub: Get updates on new features and launches.
footer.emailThanks: You're on the list. We'll be in touch!

cta.heading: Your next book is waiting.
cta.description: Download Librea and find second-hand books in your neighbourhood today.

testimonials.heading: Real people, real books.
testimonials.q1: I sold three books in a week and bought two more for almost nothing. The meetup was five minutes from my door.
testimonials.q2: Finally a marketplace that makes sense for books. No shipping fees, no waiting — just people sharing what they love.
testimonials.q3: I found a copy of a book I'd been hunting for months, half a kilometre away. This app is magic.
testimonials.q4: Listed my old university books in minutes and sold them the same day. Couldn't believe how easy it was.

features.heading:
Everything you need,
nothing you don't.
features.description: Librea is designed to make buying and selling second-hand books in your neighbourhood effortless.
features.f1_title: Discover books and readers in your area.
features.f1_desc: Browse what people nearby are reading and connect over shared taste.
features.f2_desc: Point your camera at the barcode and it's listed instantly — no typing needed.
features.f3_desc: Save the books you love and offer the ones gathering dust on your shelf.
features.f4_title: Share your books with friends and locals.
features.f4_desc: Your shelf becomes a little library for everyone around you.

hero.heading:
Read More,
Pay Less
hero.description: Librea connects readers who want to pass on their books with those who want to get them cheap. Buy second-hand, sell with ease — a community built around the love of reading.

signupConfirmation.heading: Your email is confirmed.
signupConfirmation.body: Welcome to Librea. Download the app and start sharing books with people around you.
